armor_proficiencies: Javelin, spear, martial weapons, Dagger, sword, mace, club
Javelin, short sword, longsword, shortsword, crossbow, bullwhip, lasso, quarterstaff, rapier, scimitar, sling, thrown hammer, warhammer
Tools: Throwing axe, battle-axe, war pick
Musical instruments, mess kit, bedroll, ropes, rations, waterskin, torches (10), lantern, gold pieces

data.description: The presence of strong evil registers on your senses like a noxious odor, and powerful good rings like heavenly music in your ears.
By 2nd level, you have learned to draw on divine magic through meditation and prayer.
